events.title: The Seventh Seal (1957) - Ingmar Bergman Retrospective
events.description: A haunting allegory of faith and mortality. The disillusioned knight Antonius Block returns from the Crusades to find plague ravaging his homeland. He challenges Death to a game of chess, desperate to find meaning in life before his inevitable end.

events.title: In the Mood for Love (2000) - 4K Restoration
events.description: Wong Kar-wai's exquisite tale of unfulfilled desire. In 1960s Hong Kong, neighbors Mr. Chow and Mrs. Chan discover their spouses are having an affair, drawing them into a tender but chaste bond that neither can fully express.

events.title: The Met: Lives of the Gods - Masterpieces of Maya Art
events.description: Explore nearly 100 rarely seen masterpieces and recent finds in this landmark exhibition. Discover how Maya artists depicted divine power and the natural world through extraordinary ceramic, jade, and stone artworks.

events.title: Moonlight (2016) - Directors Series
events.description: Barry Jenkins' Academy Award-winning masterpiece follows Chiron through three defining chapters of his life as he grapples with his identity and sexuality while growing up in Miami. A profoundly moving portrait of Black masculinity.

events.title: Joan Didion: What She Means - Exhibition Opening
events.description: This exhibition celebrates the life and work of Joan Didion through visual art, photography, and ephemera. Featuring works by artists she influenced and who influenced her, including Richard Avedon, Vija Celmins, and Felix Gonzalez-Torres.

events.title: Parasite (2019) - Bong Joon-ho Weekend
events.description: The Palme d'Or and Oscar-winning sensation returns to the big screen. The Kim family insinuates themselves into the wealthy Park household, but their scheme unravels in shocking and darkly comic ways.

events.title: Akira (1988) - Anime Classics
events.description: Katsuhiro Otomo's cyberpunk masterpiece in 35mm. In Neo-Tokyo, biker gang leader Kaneda must save his friend Tetsuo from a secret government project that threatens to unleash psychic destruction upon the city.

events.title: Edward Hopper's New York - Special Exhibition
events.description: Discover how Edward Hopper captured the essence of New York City in his iconic paintings. This exhibition brings together over 200 works exploring his vision of urban solitude, architecture, and the interplay of light and shadow.

events.title: Double Feature: The Piano Teacher (2001)
events.description: Isabelle Huppert delivers a tour-de-force performance as Erika Kohut, a repressed piano instructor at the Vienna Conservatory whose controlled existence is disrupted by a young student's romantic pursuit. Michael Haneke's unsettling drama.

events.title: BAM: Next Wave Festival - Meredith Monk Performance
events.description: Legendary composer and vocalist Meredith Monk presents new works alongside seminal pieces from her pioneering career. Experience her unique vocal techniques and interdisciplinary approach that has influenced generations of artists.

events.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel (2014) - Wes Anderson 35mm
events.description: Wes Anderson's delightful confection starring Ralph Fiennes as the legendary concierge M. Gustave. When a priceless painting is stolen and a family fortune contested, Gustave and his lobby boy Zero embark on an adventure across the fictional Republic of Zubrowka.

events.title: MoMA Film: Casablanca (1942) - Valentine's Weekend Encore
events.description: The timeless romance returns to MoMA's screens. Rick Blaine must choose between his love for Ilsa and helping her resistance leader husband escape from Casablanca. 'Here's looking at you, kid.'

events.title: The Metropolitan Opera: La Traviata
events.description: Verdi's beloved opera about the tragic courtesan Violetta and her ill-fated love for Alfredo. This new production features a stellar cast and sumptuous sets that capture the glamour and heartbreak of 19th-century Paris.

events.title: Metrograph: House (1977) - Nobuhiko Obayashi
events.description: A psychedelic horror experience like no other. Seven schoolgirls visit a haunted countryside house and are devoured one by one by the bizarre manifestations of the house itself. A cult classic of Japanese cinema.
